A close-up photograph of a young woman with pale skin and dark, wavy black hair, looking directly at the camera with large, expressive blue eyes. She has a serious expression and is wearing a light-colored sweater. The lighting is dimly lit, creating a mysterious and eerie atmosphere. The background is blurred, but it appears to be an indoor setting with a door and a wall. The image has a high-quality, realistic style with a focus on the woman's face and upper body.
